The Reality of the Market

The average eligible buyer qualifies for
3 to 5 programs simultaneously.

Fewer than 12% of real estate and mortgage professionals can name all of them. That means qualified buyers are leaving money on the table every day — not because the programs don't exist, but because the professionals serving them don't have the right tool. Empire HomePath closes that gap in seconds.

12%
of real estate & mortgage
professionals know all programs
The Problem We Solve

Buyers qualify.
The programs exist.
Nobody can find them.

New York has more homebuyer assistance programs than almost any state in the country — scattered across 62 counties, hundreds of agencies, and thousands of eligibility rules that change every year. No professional can track all of it manually. That is exactly what Empire HomePath was built to solve.

Counties — every one covered

Platform. The only one like it in New York.
Before Empire HomePath
Hours lost to manual research

Loan officers spending half a day across agency websites, calling housing departments, reading outdated PDFs — for programs that may have already run out of funding.

With Empire HomePath

Verified results in seconds. Client report generated before the call ends.

Before Empire HomePath
Deals lost to incomplete knowledge

When professionals do not know what is available, buyers who qualify go unserved. A closed door for a family. A missed closing for the professional.

With Empire HomePath

Complete county coverage means no program missed, no qualified buyer left behind.

Before Empire HomePath
No single source of truth

There has never been one verified, comprehensive database for all 62 New York counties — until now.

With Empire HomePath

One platform. One login. Every program in New York State.

Platform Features

Built for the way
professionals work.

No tab-switching. No stale PDFs. No guesswork. The right program, for the right buyer, the moment you need it.
Search
Statewide Program Search

Filter by county, program type, income limit, purchase price, or buyer eligibility. Answers in seconds — not hours of manual research across scattered agency websites.

Data
Verified and Current

Every program reviewed on a rolling basis. Funding availability, income limits, eligibility rules, and contact information — always accurate, always up to date.

Coverage
All 62 Counties

From Manhattan to St. Lawrence. No geographic blind spots, no missing rural programs. The complete Empire State, fully covered in one place.

Reports
Client PDF Reports

Generate clean, professional program summaries to share directly with buyers. Each report includes full program details, contact information, and next steps to apply.

Enterprise
White-Label Ready

Brokerages, banks, and housing agencies can deploy Empire HomePath data under their own brand for their entire team with centralized account management.

Alerts
Targeted Qualified Programs

Empire HomePath targets the current and available programs your clients qualify for, keeping you and your clients up to date.

Who It's For

For professionals who won't
leave a buyer behind.

Empire HomePath was built for the mortgage and real estate professionals who believe every qualified buyer deserves a shot at homeownership — and who want the tools to make it happen.
Mortgage Professionals
Loan Officers and Mortgage Brokers

Know what your borrowers qualify for before the first conversation. Be the professional who always has an answer and always finds the funding.

  • Match clients to DPA and grant programs instantly
  • Reduce time-to-close with verified eligibility data
  • Build a reputation for finding money others miss
  • Grow referrals by solving a real professional pain
Real Estate Professionals
Agents and Brokers

Turn "I can't afford it" into "let me show you what is available." Close deals that would otherwise fall apart at the financing stage.

  • Convert fence-sitting buyers with real funding options
  • Stand out by offering homebuyer assistance expertise
  • Serve diverse buyers across every price point
  • Differentiate your practice in a competitive market
Enterprise and Institutional
Banks, CDFIs and Housing Agencies

Equip your team with the most complete homebuyer assistance database in New York State — under your own brand.

  • White-label deployment under your institution's name
  • Multi-user team access with centralized management
  • API-ready data integration options available
  • Supports CRA goals and mission-driven lending
Housing Counselors
HUD-Approved Counseling Agencies

Give every client the complete picture of what is available across every county your agency serves — with data that is always current.

  • Complete statewide coverage for multi-county agencies
  • Shareable professional client program summaries
  • Real-time data — never present outdated information
  • Serve more families with the same staff resources

Legal Disclaimer

Empire HomePath — Data Use Disclaimer

The information provided on this platform is compiled for general informational purposes only and is intended solely for use by licensed real estate, mortgage, and housing professionals.

Empire HomePath LLC makes every effort to ensure the accuracy and currency of homebuyer assistance program data across all 62 New York counties. However, program details including eligibility requirements, income limits, funding availability, and application procedures are subject to change at any time without notice by the administering agency.

Empire HomePath LLC does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any program information. Users are solely responsible for independently verifying all program details with the relevant administering agency before advising clients or making professional representations.

This platform does not constitute legal, financial, or lending advice. Nothing herein shall create a professional or fiduciary relationship between Empire HomePath LLC and any user or end client.

Use of this platform constitutes acceptance of these terms. For questions, contact us at empirehomepath.com.
